# CWE-403 safe — Exposure of File Descriptor to Unintended Control Sphere (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-403-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/exec"
	"syscall"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func RunUserScript(c *GinCtx) error {
	secret, err := os.Open("/etc/codehound/master.key")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer secret.Close()
	cmd := exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", c.Request.PostFormValue("script"))
	cmd.Stdout = os.Stdout
	cmd.SysProcAttr = &syscall.SysProcAttr{Setpgid: true}
	if extra := secret.Fd(); extra > 2 {
		_ = syscall.Close(int(extra))
	}
	return cmd.Run()
}
